translations.en: I like the way he talks.
translations.pt: Gosto do jeito que ele fala.
translations.vi: Tôi thích cách anh ấy nói chuyện.
translations.nl: Ik vind de manier waarop hij praat leuk.
translations.hi: मुझे उसके बोलने का तरीका पसंद है।
translations.pl: Podoba mi się sposób, w jaki on mówi.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει ο τρόπος που μιλάει.
translations.nb: Jeg liker måten han snakker på.
translations.ro: Îmi place felul în care vorbește.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide, hvordan han taler.
translations.ja: 彼の話し方が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Elided subject clitic pronoun before a vowel; marks the first-person singular subject of the verb.
Finite verb (present, 1st person singular); main predicate expressing liking.
Possessive determiner agreeing feminine singular with 'manière'; specifies whose manner.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the noun phrase 'sa manière'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('parler') that specifies the manner.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement to 'manière' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu peux expliquer ta manière de faire.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɛksplike ta manjɛʁ də fɛʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux expliquer ta manière de faire.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɛksplike ta manjɛʁ də fɛʁ/
translations.en: Can you explain your way of doing it?
translations.es: Puedes explicar tu manera de hacerlo.
translations.it: Puoi spiegare il tuo modo di fare.
translations.ko: 네가 하는 방식을 설명할 수 있어요.
translations.ru: Ты можешь объяснить, как ты это делаешь.
translations.pt: Você pode explicar seu jeito de fazer.
translations.he: אתה יכול להסביר את הדרך שבה אתה עושה זאת.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giải thích cách bạn làm.
translations.ar: يمكنك شرح طريقتك في القيام بذلك.
translations.uk: Ти можеш пояснити, як ти це робиш.
translations.hi: तुम अपना तरीका समझा सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να εξηγήσεις τον τρόπο που το κάνεις.
translations.nb: Du kan forklare måten du gjør det på.
translations.sv: Du kan förklara hur du gör.
translations.ro: Poți să explici felul în care o faci.
translations.da: Du kan forklare, hvordan du gør det.
translations.ja: あなたのやり方を説明できます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular); subject of 'peux'.
Modal verb (present, 2nd person singular); expresses ability and governs the infinitive 'expliquer'.
Infinitive verb; lexical complement of the modal 'peux'.
Possessive determiner (feminine singular) modifying 'manière'; indicates possession.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the noun phrase 'ta manière'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'faire' that specifies the manner.
Infinitive verb; complement to 'manière' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: Il cuisine d'une manière très simple.

translations.fr: Il cuisine d'une manière très simple.
translations.en: He cooks in a very simple way.
translations.es: Él cocina de forma muy sencilla.
translations.pt: Ele cozinha de forma muito simples.
translations.tr: Çok basit bir şekilde yemek pişirir.
translations.vi: Anh ấy nấu ăn rất đơn giản.
translations.hi: वह बहुत सरल तरीके से खाना बनाता है।
translations.id: Dia memasak dengan cara yang sangat sederhana.
translations.ja: 彼はとても簡単に料理します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular); subject of 'cuisine'.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person singular); main predicate.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; introduces 'une manière' ('in a manner').
Indefinite article (feminine singular); determiner for 'manière'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition forming the manner phrase.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'simple'.
Adjective modifying 'manière'; describes the manner; agrees in gender/number (form is identical here).

sentences.target: C'est une bonne manière de faire.

translations.fr: C'est une bonne manière de faire.
translations.en: That's a good way to do it.
translations.es: Es una buena manera de hacerlo.
translations.it: È un buon modo di farlo.
translations.pt: É uma boa maneira de fazer isso.
translations.he: זו דרך טובה לעשות את זה.
translations.tr: Bu, bunu yapmanın iyi bir yolu.
translations.vi: Đó là một cách làm tốt.
translations.nl: Dat is een goede manier om het te doen.
translations.hu: Ez egy jó módja annak, hogy ezt megcsináljuk.
translations.hi: यह इसे करने का एक अच्छा तरीका है।
translations.pl: To jest dobry sposób, żeby to zrobić.
translations.el: Είναι ένας καλός τρόπος για να το κάνεις.
translations.nb: Det er en god måte å gjøre det på.
translations.id: Itu cara yang baik untuk melakukannya.
translations.sv: Det är ett bra sätt att göra det.
translations.ro: Este o modalitate bună de a face asta.
translations.cs: To je dobrý způsob, jak to udělat.
translations.da: Det er en god måde at gøre det på.
translations.fi: Se on hyvä tapa tehdä se.

tokens.explanation: Elided demonstrative pronoun used as subject in the copular construction 'C'est'.
Copula (present, 3rd person singular); links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article (feminine singular); determiner for 'manière'.
Adjective (feminine singular) prenominally modifying 'manière'; expresses quality.
Common noun (feminine singular); predicate nominal complement of 'est'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'faire' specifying the action.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement to 'manière' introduced by 'de'.
